sites.name: Site 1 (His)
sites.why: This group sits against a polar residue (HIS407) in PXR's sparse anchor set (Ser247/Gln285/His407 pin canonical agonists). The contact here is weak/edge-on, and PXR's pocket is a large, flexible, mostly-uncharged cavity — so the model under-weighted it and the atoms landed ~3.4 Å off.
sites.cite: Sci Rep 2018 (anchor cluster S247/Q285/H407, uncharged pocket).
